name: tdd_decision_result
description: Report the TDD workflow decision in structured format. Call this tool to record your TDD plan.

risk_level.description: The risk level driving TDD behavior

tdd_mode.description: The TDD enforcement mode for this risk level

cycle_type.description: The TDD cycle type to use

max_cycles.description: Maximum number of Red-Green cycles allowed (0 = unlimited, 5 = P2 limit)

skip_allowed.description: Whether skipping TDD is allowed for this scenario

reads_plan_first.description: Whether the Plan file must be read before writing tests

subagent_delegation.description: Whether TDD cycles should be delegated to subagents
